RUBY.title: Hoshino Rui's Clothes
RUBY.description: A girl full of enthusiasm and idol aura. She is always full of confidence on stage and is always looking for someone in the audience. No one knows why she is always so obsessed with the audience.
RUBY.banter.alive.endTurnPing: I definitely want to become an idol. After all, my mother was once so dazzling...
RUBY.banter.dead.endTurnPing: Sorry, doctor, I still can't find you...
RUBY.cardsModifierDescription: Ruby's cards now appear in rewards and in the store.
RUBY.eventDeathPrevention: Doctor, mother, I'm here to see you...
RUBY.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
AQUA.title: Hoshino Aiku Aihai
AQUA.description: A boy with a mature aura that is not among his peers. On weekdays, he always appears calm and collected. Entering the entertainment industry to find someone, no one knows what his true purpose is.
AQUA.banter.alive.endTurnPing: I will definitely avenge love, and I will definitely cut such people into pieces...
AQUA.banter.dead.endTurnPing: Sorry, Sarina, love, I have to go and accompany you...
AQUA.cardsModifierDescription: Aqua's cards will now appear in rewards and in the store.
AQUA.eventDeathPrevention: Doctor, mother, I'm here to see you...
AQUA.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
